title: Unpacking the NATO Summit in Ankara
gist: A Warcast episode on the NATO summit in Ankara, which produced new weapons deals, support for Ukraine through 2027, and a reaffirmation of Article 5 against a backdrop of real tension within the alliance.

insights.claim: The NATO summit in Ankara produced new weapons deals, support for Ukraine through 2027, and a reaffirmation of Article 5.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Codifies continued allied arms and Ukraine funding commitments through 2027 — a demand signal for defense suppliers.
insights.locator: NATO leaders wrapped up a summit in Ankara

insights.claim: The summit's public unity came against a backdrop of real tension within the alliance.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Internal alliance friction is the underlying risk to the durability of these commitments.
insights.locator: all against a backdrop of real tension
